name: Schweinekoteletts in Saurer Sahnesosse (Baked Pork Chops)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use only Hungarian mild paprika, available at most larger stores and specialty shops.
2. Place the pork chops in an ovenproof casserole dish.
3. Mix together the remaining ingredients except sour cream and pour over the pork chops.
4. Marinate the chops for 2 to 3 hours in the refrigerator.
5. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Bake the chops, uncovered, in the marinade for 1 hour or until tender. Add more wine if necessary.
7. Stir sour cream into pan juices and heat through but do not boil.
8. Serve chops with sour-cream gravy and buttered noodles or dumplings.
